title: Property Consultant - Omkar Realtors - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Omkar Realtors - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Omkar Realtors, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Vadodara operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Omkar Realtors:
Omkar Realtors is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Omkar Realtors!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
